criteria.criterion: DBB-m24-001: ls pagination page 1 returns first N entries (ls() lines 498-503)
DBB-m24-002: ls pagination page 2 returns next slice (offset calculation: (page-1)*pageSize)
DBB-m24-003: ls --page-size controls entries per page
DBB-m24-004: ls pagination out-of-range returns empty
DBB-m24-005: ls -l with pagination works (long format + pagination)
DBB-m24-006: ls default page size is 20 (line 470)
DBB-m24-007: find -type f returns only files (findRecursive line 707)
DBB-m24-008: find -type d returns only directories
DBB-m24-010: rm -r refuses root '/' (line 812: `return "rm: refusing to remove '/'"`)
DBB-m24-011: rm -r root returns exitCode 1 (error format matches exitCodeFor regex)
DBB-m24-012: cd to file returns 'Not a directory' error (cd() line 733)
DBB-m24-013: Path resolution .. escape prevention — normalizePath stops at root (line 350: `if (stack.length) stack.pop()`)
DBB-m24-014: Path resolution ../ chains work correctly
DBB-m24-015: Path resolution absolute vs relative paths
DBB-m24-016: Path resolution trailing slashes handled
DBB-m24-017: Path resolution dot segments (./) handled
DBB-m24-018: mkdir error format is UNIX-standard (lines 769, 774-776)
